Fix Summary: Updated React from 19.0.0 to 19.1.0 and Next.js from 15.3.2 to latest stable version in client/package.json
Notes: Eliminates critical RCE vulnerabilities actively exploited in the wild. No workarounds available - update was mandatory.

Fix Summary: Created canAccessIdea middleware and applied to 10 vulnerable GET endpoints in idea-routes.ts (lines 410, 710, 723, 808, 918, 1105, 1238, 1549, 1571, 1599). Added getIdea() method to storage.ts for authorization checks.
Notes: Prevents unauthorized access to ideas, comments, reviews, scores, AI outputs, lifecycle data, and audit logs. Validates PEN-1.3 finding from penetration test.

Finding Title: IDOR on Evaluation Criteria Files Endpoints
Fix Summary: Created requireOrgMembership middleware and applied to 2 endpoints in routes.ts (lines 4104, 4188): GET /api/organizations/:orgId/criteria-files and GET /api/organizations/:orgId/criteria-files/:fileId/content
Notes: Prevents competitive intelligence theft and unauthorized access to proprietary evaluation frameworks.

Finding Title: Missing Authorization on Status Update Endpoint
Fix Summary: Created canModifyIdea middleware and applied to PATCH /api/ideas/management/:id/status endpoint (idea-routes.ts:202)
Notes: Prevents unauthorized status changes. Only idea owner or org admin/owner can modify. Validates PEN-1.3 finding.

Finding Title: Missing Authorization on AI Outputs Endpoint
Fix Summary: Applied canModifyIdea middleware to POST /api/ideas/:id/ai-outputs endpoint (idea-routes.ts:821)
Notes: Prevents malicious AI output injection into competitors' ideas. Validates PEN-1.3 finding.

Fix Summary: Applied canModifyIdea middleware to POST /api/ideas/:id/reviewers endpoint (idea-routes.ts:1182)
Notes: Prevents unwanted reviewer assignment to disrupt workflow. Validates PEN-1.3 finding.

Finding Title: fileUploadLimiter Not Applied to All Endpoints
Fix Summary: Added fileUploadLimiter to POST /api/organizations/:orgId/upload-criteria endpoint (routes.ts:3998)
Notes: Prevents DoS attacks via file upload abuse. Logo upload endpoint already had limiter applied.

Fix Summary: Added aiRateLimiter to POST /api/ideas/:id/evaluate (idea-routes.ts:1427) and POST /api/ideas/:id/score (idea-routes.ts:1483). Other AI endpoints already protected.
Notes: Prevents cost abuse through unprotected AI endpoints. Eliminates estimated $20/hour attack vector.

Fix Summary: Implemented atomic database transaction in routes.ts:3955-3998. Uses UPDATE...WHERE with token validity check, expiry check, and password update in single transaction.
Notes: Eliminates TOCTOU vulnerability. Token is atomically checked and marked as used before password update. Related to but distinct from PEN-1.1 (token reuse) which was already fixed.

Fix Summary: Verified X-CSRF-Token is present in CORS allowedHeaders (cors.ts:70)
Notes: No action needed - already properly configured in previous security updates.

Fix Summary: Added domain: process.env.COOKIE_DOMAIN || undefined to session cookie configuration (auth.ts:78)
Notes: Improves cookie security in production environments. Defaults to undefined for localhost development.

Finding Title: Insufficient Rate Limiting on Data Export
Fix Summary: Created dataExportLimiter (5 requests/hour) in security.ts:136-142 and applied to POST /api/user/export endpoint (routes.ts:212)
Notes: Prevents abuse of data export functionality. Limits each IP to 5 exports per hour.

Fix Summary: Not addressed in this security update
Notes: Recommended for long-term improvement. Low priority - informational finding.

Finding Title: No Account Lockout After Failed Logins
Fix Summary: Not addressed in this security update
Notes: Recommended for long-term improvement. Current rate limiting provides partial protection.

Fix Summary: Not addressed in this security update
Notes: Recommended for long-term improvement. Would require 2 hours effort per assessment.

Fix Summary: Not addressed in this security update
Notes: Frontend finding. Recommended for review in future frontend security audit.

Fix Summary: Token invalidation properly implemented in storage.ts:165-180. Tokens marked as used immediately after password update.
Notes: Externally validated as fixed by penetration test. Database includes 'used' boolean and 'usedAt' timestamp fields.

Fix Summary: Vulnerable endpoint /api/projects/update-relate-information has been completely removed. Current implementation uses whitelist-based field filtering and DOMPurify sanitization.
Notes: Externally validated as fixed. Architectural improvement eliminated dangerous dynamic key/value parameter pattern.

Finding Title: Unauthorized Control Over Other Users' Ideas
Fix Summary: Addressed by fixes V2-2.1 (IDOR on GET endpoints) and V2-2.3 (missing authorization on state-changing endpoints). All identified endpoints now have proper authorization.
Notes: Externally validates our internal findings. Penetration test confirmed these vulnerabilities were exploitable in production.

Finding Title: Insecure Access to Delete Other Users' Projects
Fix Summary: DELETE endpoint protected with canModifyProject middleware at routes.ts:843. Middleware verifies project ownership or org admin role (authorization.ts:58-102).
Notes: Externally validated as fixed by penetration test.

Fix Summary: TinyMCE completely removed and replaced with Monaco Editor (@monaco-editor/react:^4.7.0)
Notes: Externally validated as fixed. Monaco Editor is a code editor maintained by Microsoft - different attack surface.

Fix Summary: TinyMCE completely removed and replaced with Monaco Editor
Notes: Externally validated as fixed. Same remediation as PEN-1.5.
